content.text:
<user_query>
帮我用英语写一封邮件，保持用词专业且简介，邮件大意为：需要法务部同事帮忙review修改后的催收短信模板是否合规
</user_query>

好的，这是一封专业简洁的英文邮件草稿，你可以使用：

```
Subject: Request for Legal Review: Revised Debt Collection SMS Templates

Dear Legal Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

We would appreciate your assistance in reviewing our revised debt collection SMS templates for compliance with all relevant regulations and internal policies.

Please let us know if these templates meet legal requirements or if any modifications are needed.

Thank you for your time and expertise.

Sincerely,

[你的名字]
[你的职位]
```
